'''鈭歬-r-dh-s''' ('''kakardhesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:egotise|egotise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-r-dh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:egotise|egotise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-r-dh-s
|-
! Lemma
| kakardhesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikardhesoko|thikardhesoko]] || [[word:jikardhesoko|jikardhesoko]] || [[word:shikardhesoko|shikardhesoko]] || [[word:kikardhesoko|kikardhesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukardhesoko|thuthukardhesoko]] || [[word:jujukardhesoko|jujukardhesoko]] || [[word:shushukardhesoko|shushukardhesoko]] || [[word:kukukardhesoko|kukukardhesoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukardhesoko|thukardhesoko]] || [[word:jukardhesoko|jukardhesoko]] || [[word:shukardhesoko|shukardhesoko]] || [[word:kukardhesoko|kukardhesoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokardhesoko|thothokardhesoko]] || [[word:jojokardhesoko|jojokardhesoko]] || [[word:shoshokardhesoko|shoshokardhesoko]] || [[word:kokokardhesoko|kokokardhesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokardhesoko|thokardhesoko]] || [[word:jokardhesoko|jokardhesoko]] || [[word:shokardhesoko|shokardhesoko]] || [[word:kokardhesoko|kokardhesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokardhesoko|thokardhesoko]] || [[word:jokardhesoko|jokardhesoko]] || [[word:shokardhesoko|shokardhesoko]] || [[word:kokardhesoko|kokardhesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kardhesoko|th忙kardhesoko]] || [[word:j忙kardhesoko|j忙kardhesoko]] || [[word:sh忙kardhesoko|sh忙kardhesoko]] || [[word:k忙kardhesoko|k忙kardhesoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakardhesoko|thakardhesoko]] || [[word:jakardhesoko|jakardhesoko]] || [[word:shakardhesoko|shakardhesoko]] || [[word:kakardhesoko|kakardhesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
